decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Amulet of Vigor and Crumbling Vestige to cast Primeval Titan and search for Valakut, the Molten Pinnacle. By using cards like Scapeshift and Green Sun's Zenith, the deck can quickly assemble the combo of Primeval Titan, Valakut, and enough mountains to deal lethal damage to the opponent in one turn. The deck also includes utility lands like Tolaria West and Vesuva to help find key pieces of the combo and ensure consistency in executing the win condition.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures and spells to quickly deplete the opponent's life total. It includes cards that can deal direct damage, resurrect creatures from the graveyard, and disrupt the opponent's hand. With a combination of efficient creature removal, hand disruption, and powerful finishers such as Sheoldred, the Apocalypse, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with relentless pressure and maintain control of the battlefield. Additionally, the deck includes cards that can provide card advantage and resilience in the late game, ensuring a strong presence throughout the match.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using Basking Broodscale, Glaring Fleshraker, and Devourer of Destiny to generate a large number of tokens and creatures. By sacrificing creatures to boost Blade of the Bloodchief, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a massive board presence. With cards like Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command to control the board, along with Eldrazi Temple and Urza's Saga for ramp, the goal is to quickly build up a strong army and dominate the battlefield. Efficiently utilizing these synergies is key to the deck's success.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana through Birthing Ritual and using that mana to play powerful Simic creatures and spells. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and disruption, utilizing cards like Coiling Oracle, Ice-Fang Coatl, and Shardless Agent to generate advantage while controlling the board with Force of Negation and Flare of Denial. Harbinger of the Seas provides additional disruption while Subtlety and Sink into Stupor help deal with threats. The deck aims to close out games quickly by leveraging its mana advantage and powerful creature presence.

The deck aims to quickly assemble the Allosaurus Rider and Neoform combo to put out huge creatures like Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant or Griselbrand onto the battlefield early in the game. It uses cards like Eldritch Evolution and Misty Rainforest to search for the necessary pieces, while also utilizing support cards like Consign to Memory and Planar Genesis to control the board and manipulate the game state. The inclusion of Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer provides protection and disruption to ensure the combo goes off smoothly.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury for additional damage. The deck utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory for control and protection while maintaining a fast and relentless attacking strategy. Cards like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos provide additional versatility and disruption, making this deck a powerful and versatile aggressive force in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on disrupting and controlling the opponent's strategy through counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. The deck aims to maintain board control and card advantage while gradually wearing down the opponent's resources. Key cards like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Field of Ruin help to draw cards and disrupt the opponent's mana base, while cards like Counterspell and Fatal Push provide efficient answers to threats. The deck's win condition is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently controlling the game until it can close out the match.

The main concept of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction. The deck aims to control the board and out-value the opponent by efficiently dealing with threats and maintaining card advantage through card draw and selection. It also includes a few powerful win conditions like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian to close out the game once control has been established. Overall, the deck focuses on disruption, control, and strategic decision-making to come out on top in 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on quickly putting powerful creatures into play from the graveyard through reanimation spells such as Unearth and Persist. Utilizing cards like Thoughtseize and Collective Brutality to disrupt the opponent's strategy while filling up the graveyard with cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with large creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Emperor of Bones, while using cards like Fatal Push to control the board. The deck aims to quickly close out the game with powerful combos and reanimated threats.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through card advantage, removal spells, and powerful planeswalkers. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating value from cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Quantum Riddler. By using cards like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Prismatic Ending, it can handle a variety of threats on the board. The deck also includes powerful attackers like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to close out the game quickly once control is established. The inclusion of Teferi, Time Raveler and Wrath of the Skies provide additional utility and board control options.

This Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of low-cost aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer, supported by removal spells like Thraben Charm and Galvanic Discharge. The deck also utilizes cards like Goblin Bombardment and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah for extra damage and board control. The key strategy is to build a wide board presence quickly and maintain pressure on the opponent, while also having access to utility cards like Ranger-Captain of Eos and Arena of Glory for added flexibility and resilience.

The primary strategy of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls provide early pressure, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury can deal direct damage to the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Arena of Glory provide additional support and synergy with the creature-heavy strategy. This deck aims to take control of the game early and maintain pressure until the opponent is defeated.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful Eldrazi creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent and disrupt their game plan with cards like Chalice of the Void and Kozilek's Command. By combining aggressive creatures like Devourer of Destiny and Eldrazi Linebreaker with disruptive spells and lands like Thought-Knot Seer and Bojuka Bog, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain control of the game through the mid to late game. The goal is to use Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls to accelerate into larger threats like It That Heralds the End and Sire of Seven Deaths to finish the game.

This deck focuses on cheating powerful creatures onto the battlefield quickly using Neoform, Eldritch Evolution, and Glittering Wish to find key combo pieces like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta. It also includes protection with Pact of Negation and search/draw spells like Eladamri's Call and Consign to Memory. The deck can win in explosive fashion by ramping into big threats or comboing off with multiple creatures in play. A versatile toolbox of creatures allows for different lines of play and strategies depending on the matchup.

The deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures with different abilities to create powerful combinations and synergies. It uses cards like Green Sun's Zenith and Yawgmoth, Thran Physician to search for key creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes cards like Walking Ballista and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and protect its creatures. By utilizing creatures with various abilities and toolbox cards, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through strategic plays and resource management.

The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to put pressure on the opponent while combining disruptive elements like Teferi, Time Raveler and Prismatic Ending to control the board. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while presenting a fast clock to close out the game quickly. Cards like Consign to Memory and Wrath of the Skies provide additional removal and card advantage to maintain tempo and keep the opponent on the back foot.
